creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=0075dcd7f970fd00fa97532afd6fabed95661f0f

commit 0075dcd7f970fd00fa97532afd6fabed95661f0f
Author:     Daniel Engberg <diizzy@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-11-06 09:29:02 +0000
Commit:     Daniel Engberg <diizzy@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-11-06 10:46:52 +0000

    audio/sox: Update to latest commit (20210509)

    Since development seems to progress very slowly just follow other distros
    and update to latest commit. We're using Gentoo's distfile as source since
    there's no way to download arbitrary git hashes in tar/zip format without
    using a browser and there's no need for us to roll our own.

    This fixes following CVEs:
    CVE-2019-13590
    CVE-2019-8357
    CVE-2019-8356
    CVE-2019-8355
    CVE-2019-8354
    CVE-2017-18189
    CVE-2017-15642
    CVE-2017-15372
    CVE-2017-15371
    CVE-2017-15370
    CVE-2017-11359
    CVE-2017-11358
    CVE-2017-11332

    Reference:
    https://github.com/doremir/sox/commit/d05aba55a86177f7a3d395c7a03c5c4e280b31fb

    PR:             267128
    Reviewed by:    Dan Nelson <dnelson@allantgroup.com> (maintainer)

 audio/sox/Makefile                       | 35 +++++++++++---------------------
 audio/sox/distinfo                       |  7 +++----
 audio/sox/files/patch-src_oss.c (gone)   | 17 ----------------
 audio/sox/files/patch-src_output.c (new) | 14 +++++++++++++
 audio/sox/pkg-plist                      |  1 -
 5 files changed, 29 insertions(+), 45 deletions(-)
